subcodes.first_line: O thou who art assured in the divine verses, according to the received tidings, the daughter of thy brother hath ascended [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای موقن بایات الله از قرار اخبار وارده اخوی زاده آنجناب یعنی بنتشان وفات
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
